'''tarobo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:tabalumab|tabalumab]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-r-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tabalumab|tabalumab]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| tarobo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tærebeth|tærebeth]] || [[word:tærebej|tærebej]] || [[word:tærebesh|tærebesh]] || [[word:tærebe|tærebe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:taroroboth|taroroboth]] || [[word:taroroboj|taroroboj]] || [[word:tarorobosh|tarorobosh]] || [[word:tarorobo|tarorobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:taroboth|taroboth]] || [[word:taroboj|taroboj]] || [[word:tarobosh|tarobosh]] || [[word:tarobo|tarobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tarofbofth|tarofbofth]] || [[word:tarofbofj|tarofbofj]] || [[word:tarofbofsh|tarofbofsh]] || [[word:tarofbof|tarofbof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tarobotho|tarobotho]] || [[word:tarobojo|tarobojo]] || [[word:tarobosho|tarobosho]] || [[word:taroboko|taroboko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:taroboth|taroboth]] || [[word:taroboj|taroboj]] || [[word:tarobosh|tarobosh]] || [[word:tarobo|tarobo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tarobothol|tarobothol]] || [[word:tarobojol|tarobojol]] || [[word:taroboshol|taroboshol]] || [[word:tarobokol|tarobokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:taroboothotho|taroboothotho]] || [[word:taroboojojo|taroboojojo]] || [[word:tarobooshosho|tarobooshosho]] || [[word:tarobooko|tarobooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tarobothon|tarobothon]] || [[word:tarobojon|tarobojon]] || [[word:taroboshon|taroboshon]] || [[word:tarobokon|tarobokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tarobothooro|tarobothooro]] || [[word:tarobojooro|tarobojooro]] || [[word:taroboshooro|taroboshooro]] || [[word:tarobokooro|tarobokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5bad82d}}
